popularStory.headline: BIO
popularStory.description:
BIO:  from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/CAPET.htm#CatherineValoisdied1346 as of 7/21/2016

JEANNE de Valois ([1294]-Abbaye de Fontenelles, Hainaut 7 Mar 1352, bur Abbaye de Fontenelles).  She becam …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de Valois於大約1291年出生在法國皮卡迪艾斯隆朋特時，她的父親Charles de Valois comte de Valois22歲，母親Marguerite d'Anjou20歲。她於1305年5月23日與Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande在法國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1342年3月7日在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德麥享年52歲，埋葬在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德麥。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne de Valois于大约1291年出生在法国皮卡迪艾斯隆朋特时，她的父亲Charles de Valois comte de Valois22岁，母亲Marguerite d'Anjou20岁。她于1305年5月23日与Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande在法国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1342年3月7日在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德麥享年52岁，埋葬在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德麥。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Valois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Henri, Normand, Alcide, Armand, Emilien, Gilberte, Gilles, Herve, Jacques, Lucien.
habitational name from (Le) Valois, the name of a few places in France, e.g. in Forez and Limousin.

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de Valois was born about 1291, in Longpont, Aisne, Picardie, France, her father, Charles de Valois comte de Valois, was 22 and her mother, Marguerite d'Anjou, was 20. She married Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande on 23 May 1305, in France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 9 daughters. She died on 7 March 1342, in Maing, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 52, and was buried in Maing, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de Valois est née environ 1291, à Longpont, Aisne, Picardie, France, son père, Charles de Valois comte de Valois, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Marguerite d'Anjou, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande le 23 mai 1305, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée le 7 mars 1342, à Maing, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Maing, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de Valois um 1291 in Longpont, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Charles de Valois comte de Valois 22 und ihre Mutter Marguerite d'Anjou 20. Sie hat am 23. Mai 1305 in Frankreich Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. März 1342 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Maing, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich und wurde in Maing, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Valois è nata il circa 1291 nel Longpont, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Charles de Valois comte de Valois, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Marguerite d'Anjou, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande il 23 maggio 1305, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 7 marzo 1342, nel Maing, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a Maing, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Valoisが約1291年にフランスピカーディエイスンロングプオントで生まれた時，父Charles de Valois comte de Valoisは22歳，母Marguerite d'Anjouは20歳であった。1305年5月23日にフランスでGuillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollandeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1342年3月7日にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードメイングで52歳で死去し，フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードメイングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Valois(이)가 대략 1291년 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 론그폰트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Charles de Valois comte de Valois(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marguerite d'Anjou(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1305년 5월 23일 프랑스에서 Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1342년 3월 7일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 맹그에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 맹그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Valois nasceu aproximadamente 1291, em Longpont, Aisne, Picardie, França, seu pai, Charles de Valois comte de Valois, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite d'Anjou, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande em 23 de maio de 1305, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 7 de março de 1342, em Maing, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Maing, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de Valois родилась около 1291 г. в местности лонгпонт, эисн, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Charles de Valois comte de Valois было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Marguerite d'Anjou, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande 23 мая 1305 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Она умерла 7 марта 1342 г. в местности меинг, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности меинг, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de Valois nació aproximadamente 1291, en Longpont, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Charles de Valois comte de Valois, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Marguerite d'Anjou, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande el 23 de mayo de 1305, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió el 7 de marzo de 1342, en Maing, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en Maing, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.
